name: TP53 RAG Platform — Full Analysis Workflow
description: Automated TP53 analysis pipeline integrated with the RAG multi-agent platform. Triggers on new accession input, runs the bioinformatics pipeline, dispatches to all RAG agents, and delivers a comprehensive report.

nodes.name: Trigger: New Accession Input
nodes.notes: Receives accession ID (e.g. NM_000546) from external systems or manual input

nodes.name: Health Check: RAG Platform
nodes.notes: Verify the RAG platform API is running before dispatching

nodes.name: Run TP53 Pipeline

parameters.command: cd /path/to/tp53_analysis && python main_tp53_analysis.py --accession {{$node['Trigger: New Accession Input'].json.accession}} --skip-domains

nodes.notes: Runs the existing TP53 bioinformatics pipeline. Adjust path as needed.

nodes.name: Load Pipeline Results
nodes.notes: Loads mutations.csv, orfs.csv, protein_domains.csv from pipeline output

nodes.name: RAG: Full Multi-Agent Analysis
nodes.notes: Dispatches to all 6 RAG agents: mutation, ORF, phylogenetics, domain, clinical, report

nodes.name: Error: Platform Not Ready
nodes.notes: Handle case where RAG platform is not running. Alert admin.
